untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-leg futures spread analysis with fair value calculation (comparing near-month vs forward-month contracts). Standard OHLCV indicators cannot model theoretical spread fair value or the contract-pair relationship. The signal needs custom spread calculation logic between two distinct futures contracts (March vs June) with premium adjustments (35¢ and 3.25 respectively), which is beyond the scope of single-instrument technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is an inter-contract spread trading strategy (calendar spread) that requires monitoring the price differential between two correlated futures contracts and comparing it to a calculated fair value. The entry condition is a market spread exceeding fair value (4.00 > 2.90), and exit is when spread reverts to fair value. This requires custom spread construction and cannot be expressed using standard price-based technical indicators alone.
